_comment: Pinned official releases for install-retro-tools.mjs — resolved and sha256-verified on 2026-06-12 by downloading each asset from its official source. The installer verifies downloads against these hashes; run with --latest to resolve newer releases (hashes then recorded into the manifest at install time instead).

86box.userMustProvide: The official 86Box machine ROM set (github.com/86Box/roms) — the installer stages the PROGRAM only and never fetches ROM files.

qemu.thirdPartyNote: QEMU publishes no official Windows binary; qemu.org's own download page links to maintainer Stefan Weil's builds at qemu.weilnetz.de (NSIS installers with published .sha512 files). The installer DISCLOSES this, verifies the publisher's sha512, and on Windows runs the installer silently into the sidecar folder (no admin, no system dirs). Use --no-qemu to skip.

godot.note: Optional (--with-godot): the editor (~55 MB) + export templates (~900 MB!) needed to export Game Mode. Hashes recorded at install time; both straight from the official godotengine GitHub releases.
